articles.title: FV Bank and Circle announce integration for USDC deposits
articles.description: FV Bank and Circle announced an integration enabling USDC deposits into customers' bank accounts.

articles.title: Crypto Analyst Issues Warnings for Avalanche (AVAX), Polygon (MATIC) and One Additional Altcoin
articles.description: A widely followed crypto analyst is issuing fresh warnings for a trio of altcoins as the markets attempts to recover from a lengthy downtrend. The pseudonymous trader known as Altcoin Sherpa tells his 183,000 Twitter followers that layer-1 blockchain Avalanche (AVAX) and Ethereum (ETH) scaling solutions Polygon (MATIC) and Optimism (OP) are primed to see […]

articles.title: How This Ripple Partnership Will Expand The Use Of XRP For Treasury Payments
articles.description: Payment company Ripple is expanding the use cases for its On Demand Liquidity (ODL) solution, according to a press release. The company will enable its partner I-Remit to improve its treasury funds flow and management. Related Reading: How A Fake Bitcoin Transaction Is Tied To The GTA 6 Leak I-Remit has been working with Ripple […]

articles.title: Ethereum Merge Puts Spotlight On Potential Centralization Issues
articles.description: The Ethereum Merge has been successfully completed and the network has been operating on a proof of stake mechanism for about a week now. The success of the upgrade has been lauded by many in the community who have praised the resourcefulness and the innovation of the Ethereum developers. However, it seems the more time […]

articles.title: Bitcoin Bull Max Keiser Blasts Ethereum As A ‘Centralized Ponzi Scheme’ As ETH’s Supply Increases Post-Merge
articles.description: One of Bitcoin’s most vocal advocates, Max Keiser, has once again criticized ethereum in the wake of the much-anticipated upgrade to the world’s second-largest crypto by market value.

articles.title: Cardano (ADA), Shiba Inu (SHIB) and XRP See Surge of Interest As Crypto Markets Dip: Analytics Firm Santiment
articles.description: A handful of crypto assets are witnessing a surge in social media interest despite the market’s price struggles this week, according to the analytics firm Santiment. Santiment notes Ethereum (ETH), XRP, Cardano (ADA), Shiba Inu (SHIB) and Polygon (MATIC) have been discussed more online in the past week, while most other crypto assets have been […]

articles.title: Could the New House Stablecoin Bill Kill FRAX and DAI?
articles.description: The legislation comes in response to the May collapse of the algorithmically-backed TerraUSD stablecoin. House lawmakers are taking a step toward regulating stablecoins.A new bill is seeking to place a two-year ban on endogenously collateralized stablecoins, according to a draft obtained by Bloomberg late Tuesday.The House Stablecoin Bill would make it illegal to issue or create new...

articles.title: Digital bank FV Bank integrates USDC stablecoin for direct deposits
articles.description: Apart from USDC support, FV Bank also plans to launch a custody service in Q4 2022, targeting major coins like Bitcoin and Ethereum.

articles.title: Tether, Bitfinex ordered to show financial documents over USDT stablecoin
articles.description: On Tuesday, a New York judge ordered Tether and Bitfinex to produce documents showing the backing of the USDT stablecoin.
